titleStmt.title: SII 15.210: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 210. (B.K. No. 57 of 1927-28.) MĒVUṆḌI, MUNDARGI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of Veṅkatēśvara temple.

This is dated the 5th regnal year of the king, Naḷa, Vaiśākha śu. 3, Uttarāyaṇa saṅkrānti, corresponding to 1196 A.D., April 3, when the weekday was Wednesday. The reference to Saṅkrānti, is evidently an error.
It registers a gift of land to the god Billēśvara of Dēhutagēri by the king and the Nakharas, Mummuridaṇḍas, Mahājanas and others of the nine towns. Further gifts to the deity are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpacakrava ¨rtti ho
ysaṇaśrī vīraballāḷadēvarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ
baraṁ saluttamire . 5 neya naḷa saṁvatsarada vayiśākha suddha 3 brihaspativāra
vuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti byatīpātadaṁdu śrīmadanādipaṭṭaṇa dēhu
tagēriya radēva¨rgge . svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya dhyāna dhāraṇa
maunānuṣṭhāna japasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannaruṁ sakaḷa vidva
jjana prasaṁnaruṁ kriyāniṣṭhāṇa niṣṭāmahimōpā¨rjjitaruṁ vupanyāsa
laharīpravāharuṁ Aticaturakavigamakivādivāgmi nayasa
mayasamūharuṁ satyarādhēyaruṁ nuḍidaṁta gaṁḍaruṁ paranārīdūraruṁ
sakaḷadha¨rmmapratipāḷakarumappa voṁbhattupurada mahāpaṁcamaṭhasthāna dēvaputrakaruṁ nakha
ra mahājanamuṁ mumuṟidaṁḍaṁgaḷuṁ tammoḷēkastharāgi billēśvaradēva¨rgge Aṁgabhōgakke
sa¨rbbābādhāparihāravāgi biṭṭa bhūmi dēhutavoladoḷage mattaru 5
Adakke sīme nālku dasagaḷoḷu liṁgamudreya seṭṭi kallu mattaṁ talligara
yattokkalu . naṁdādīvige naḍevaṁtāgi gāṇadali Arasūllageya sūṭige yaṁṇe yaṁ
biṭṭaru mattaṁ nilēśvaradēvara holanoḷage mattaru mattaṁ muḍḍavaṭṭiya
holadoḷage ballāḷadēvanu dēhutagēriya billēśvaradēva¨rgge biṭṭa ma
ttaru 12 koṟalahaḷḷiya �cagavuḍa dēhutagēriya Ā billēśvaradēva¨rgge
biṭṭa mattaru 29 ©
